testimonials.quote: Can't recommend this yacht enough — definitely better than staying in one resort. We cruised all the most amazing dive and snorkel spots. From the moment they picked us up from the airport you feel like a celebrity. The food is the best I've ever had on any boat. The only bad part is to leave.
testimonials.name: Lilian L.

testimonials.quote: Azalea and the whole crew are just awesome! Great people, great food, great sports — wake boarding, jet skis, scuba diving, surfing. The scenery cruising the Maldives is the most beautiful my family and I have ever seen. A magical experience that will last forever in our minds.
testimonials.name: Fabio D.

testimonials.quote: The crew exceeded my expectations in every way — outstanding in service, friendliness and professionalism. They instinctively knew our preferences and needs even before we knew what we wanted. The sandbar meals were especially magical. Each snorkel site was like swimming in an aquarium.
testimonials.name: Sheila B.
